name: Overnight Crunchy French Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow bowl, combine eggs, milk, sugar, vanilla, and salt. Mix well.
2. In a separate bowl, place the crushed cornflakes.
3. Dip each slice of bread into the egg mixture, then into the crushed cereal.
4. Place the coated slices on a greased 15x10 inch baking sheet.
5. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
6. Preheat oven to 425°F.
7. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown, turning once.
8. Serve with your favorite fruit syrup or fresh fruit.
